arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd vs Southampton: TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United welcome Premier League strugglers Southampton to Old Trafford with both sides in real need of three points due to their respective poor seasons so far

arts.ttl: Manchester United coach Ruben Amorim explains why Lisandro Martinez went up front vs Arsenal
arts.sum: At the end of their two-hour slugfest with Arsenal, Man United had a full back at centre back, a midfielder at wing back and a centre back up front.

arts.ttl: 'He was dead' - Amorim reveals how dedicated Harry Maguire was for Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim spoke at length about Harry Maguire and gave significant injury updates on Luke Shaw and Mason Mount.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Alejandro Garnacho exit agreement revealed amid Viktor Gyokeres boost
arts.sum: Manchester United are desperate to add a new forward to their squad in the January transfer window with Alejandro Garnacho and Marcus Rashford edging towards the Old Trafford exit door

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Southampton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing the Premier League clash between Man Utd and Southampton, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Maguire is Man Utd leader again - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim says former club captain Harry Maguire is "a leader again."

arts.ttl: What Altay Bayindir did for Man Utd teammates after FA Cup heroics revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir took his teammates out to a celebratory dinner after his penalty heroics saw off Arsenal in the FA Cup third round. United scored all five of their penalties to advance into the fourth round - a reunion with Ruud van Nistelrooy, now Leicester's manager, the reward - and Bayindir was deservedly named player of the match.

AC Milan are eagerly awaiting a response from Marcus Rashford, the Manchester United forward, as they continue their pursuit of the talented player. The Rossoneri have been actively working to secure Rashford's services, but the English international is taking some extra time to consider his future, which appears to be moving away from United under coach Ruben Amorim. The post Milan Awaiting Marcus Rashford’s Decision appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Amorim wants Manchester United to match ‘leader’ Maguire’s commitment
arts.sum: Head coach praised attitude in FA Cup win at Arsenal ‘He was dead in the end – I want that from every player’ Ruben Amorim has stated that Harry Maguire’s physical effort in Manchester United’s FA Cup third-round win at Arsenal on Sunday left him “dead” and cited this as the level of commitment he wants from all of his players. Maguire was a standout performer in the victory, via a penalty shootout, at the Emirates Stadium, which came on the back of the defender being ill in the days prior. Amorim pointed to the 31-year-old’s attitude as an example to the rest of United’s squad. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho sent clear message over Man Utd role by Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has started just five of Ruben Amorim's 13 games at Manchester United and the Reds boss has told him where he needs to improve
